name: Teuton Resources Corp.
summary: Teuton Resources Corp., an exploration stage company, acquires, explores for, and deals in mineral properties in the province of British Columbia, Canada. The company explores for gold, silver, and copper deposits. It holds interests in various properties in the Skeena Mining Division, British Columbia; Roman Property in New Westminster Mining Division, British Columbia; and Yellow Chris Property in Liard Mining Division, British Columbia. Teuton Resources Corp. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Victoria, Canada.
